Name: returns undefined for an unknown id
Description: findVideo must return undefined when no video matches the given id.

Name: all matchScore values are in the range 0–100
Description: matchScore drives the recommendation percentage badge (0–100); values outside that range would cause display bugs.

Name: returns undefined for an empty string
Description: An empty string is not a valid video id and must return undefined.

Name: finds every video present in ALL_VIDEOS by its id
Description: findVideo must successfully locate every video that exists in ALL_VIDEOS.

Name: contains at least one row
Description: The catalog must expose at least one content row.

Name: every row has a non-empty id and label
Description: Every catalog row must have a non-empty id (used as a React key) and a display label.

Name: all video IDs are unique
Description: Duplicate video IDs would cause React key collisions and routing bugs.

Name: all hlsUrl values are valid http(s) URLs
Description: HLS stream URLs must be fully-qualified http(s) addresses ending in .m3u8 so HLS.js can load them.

Name: contains a "featured" row
Description: The "featured" row drives the hero banner on the home page.

Name: movies, shows, and live tabs each have content
all videos have a contentType
returns the exact same object reference (no clone)
Description: findVideo should return the same reference stored in ALL_VIDEOS, not a copy, to enable identity comparisons.

Name: is the first video in the "featured" row
Description: HERO_VIDEO powers the full-width hero banner; it must be the leading video in the "featured" row.

Name: contains a "new-releases" row
Description: The new-releases row provides browse content for the home page.

Name: all year values are plausible (≥ 2000)
Description: Year values are displayed in the UI; obviously wrong years indicate a data entry error.

Name: is the flat union of all CATALOG rows
Description: ALL_VIDEOS must equal the flat-mapped union of every catalog row — no extras, no omissions.

Name: every row contains at least one video
Description: Rendering an empty row would produce a blank carousel — every row must have ≥ 1 video.

Name: is findable by its id
Description: HERO_VIDEO must be reachable via findVideo so detail pages work when navigating from the hero banner.

Name: contains more than 5 videos
Description: The catalog must have a meaningful number of videos — a count ≤ 5 would indicate missing content.

Name: all videos have non-empty id, title, and description
Description: Every video must have the three fields required for display in a VideoTile component.
